name: Audit Log Module
description: Append-only JSONL audit log for recording and reading operation history. Provides functions to log operations (commands, arguments, results, errors) with timestamps and retrieve recent audit entries.

types.name: AuditEntry
types.description: Structure of an audit log entry (not explicitly defined as a class, but implicitly used as a dict)

functions.name: _audit_path
functions.description: Returns the Path object for the audit log file (HISTORY_DIR/audit.jsonl). Internal helper function.
preconditions: HISTORY_DIR constant must be defined in ascend.config
postconditions: Returns a Path object pointing to audit.jsonl within HISTORY_DIR

functions.name: log_operation
functions.description: Appends an operation entry to the audit log as a JSONL record. Creates parent directories if they don't exist. Records timestamp, command, and optional args/result/error fields.

error_cases.name: file_write_error
error_cases.condition: When file cannot be opened for writing

error_cases.name: directory_creation_error
error_cases.condition: When parent directory creation fails due to permissions or other OS errors

error_cases.name: serialization_error
error_cases.condition: When json.dumps fails to serialize entry fields (though default=str fallback mitigates this)

preconditions: command must be a non-empty string
postconditions: A new line is appended to audit.jsonl
Entry contains UTC timestamp, command, and any provided optional fields
File handle is closed after write
side_effects: Creates HISTORY_DIR and parent directories if they don't exist
Appends a JSONL entry to audit.jsonl file

structured_side_effects.description: Appends JSONL entry to audit log file

functions.name: read_audit
functions.description: Reads and returns the last N entries from the audit log. Returns empty list if audit file doesn't exist. Skips blank lines.

inputs.name: last_n
inputs.description: Number of most recent entries to return

error_cases.name: file_read_error
error_cases.condition: When file exists but cannot be read due to permissions

error_cases.name: json_parse_error
error_cases.condition: When a non-blank line contains invalid JSON

postconditions: Returns a list of at most last_n audit entry dictionaries
Returns empty list if audit file does not exist
Entries are in chronological order (oldest to newest of the returned slice)
Blank lines in the file are skipped

structured_side_effects.description: Reads audit log entries from file

invariants: Audit log is append-only (no modification or deletion of existing entries)
Each entry is a single line of JSON followed by newline
All timestamps are in UTC ISO format
Entries maintain chronological order (newest at end)

data_access.rationale: Module reads from and writes to audit.jsonl file in HISTORY_DIR for append-only audit logging

side_effects.rationale: Appends structured audit entries to JSONL file for operation history tracking
Reads audit entries from JSONL file for history retrieval

authority.rationale: This module is the authoritative source for audit log operations, managing the append-only audit.jsonl file
